prompt: Using the provided reference image as the character base, transform it into a high-energy tall-proportioned shoujo/anime idol illustration. Preserve the rainbow hair as the key identity feature, but redraw the subject in a dynamic pop-star pose: one hand making a peace sign toward the viewer and the other clenched in a cute energetic fist. Replace the real bar setting and plain shirt with a vivid Harajuku idol outfit: pink-and-purple patterned crop top, cropped jacket, frilly mini skirt, wide belt with dangling chains and star charms, striped knee sock, pink sneaker, layered bead bracelets, heart and star jewelry, and a large pink polka-dot bow. Add a saturated comic-pop background filled with halftone dots, hearts, stars, sparkles, paint splashes, and speech-bubble typography. Include exactly 3 comic text bubbles: “YEAH!” in the upper left, “LOVE IT!” on the right, and “POP!” in the lower left. Keep the face area obscured with a plain square censor block like the reference. Use bright glossy colors, thick clean linework, dramatic manga highlights, and a cheerful magazine-cover composition.
